title: Sticky services inflation commentary pushed rate-cut expectations lower
snippet: Several macro desks highlighted stubborn services inflation and a less dovish path for cuts.

title: Crude oil rebound raised near-term inflation sensitivity
snippet: Front-month crude bounced, nudging inflation-sensitive contracts and yield proxies.

title: Firm labor data kept the macro tone hawkish
snippet: Traders cited stronger labor data as a reason to price a slower easing path.
